_comment: Product categories the bot recommends from. The spec asks the bot to recommend a product CATEGORY after 1-2 clarifying questions, so no specific SKUs or prices are listed.

categories.name: Insulated Jackets
categories.description: Warm down or synthetic jackets for cold, dry conditions.

categories.name: Rain Shells & Waterproof Jackets
categories.description: Waterproof, windproof outer layers for wet and windy weather.

categories.name: Base Layers & Fleece
categories.description: Breathable midlayers and base layers for warmth you can regulate.

categories.name: Tents & Shelters
categories.description: Backpacking and car-camping tents across season ratings.

categories.name: Sleeping Bags
categories.description: Down and synthetic bags rated for different temperatures.

categories.name: Sleeping Pads
categories.description: Insulated and inflatable pads for comfort and warmth off the ground.

categories.name: Backpacks
categories.description: Daypacks through multi-day packs for any trip length.

categories.name: Hiking Footwear
categories.description: Boots and trail shoes with support and grip for the trail.

categories.name: Camp Kitchen & Cooking
categories.description: Stoves, cookware, and tools for cooking outdoors.

categories.name: Hydration & Water Treatment
categories.description: Bottles, reservoirs, and filters to stay hydrated safely.
